predicate_mappings.operator_approval_recorded: the operator approval is recorded for {}
predicate_mappings.staged_audit_marked: {} is marked for a staged audit
predicate_mappings.checkpoint_slot_candidate: {} is a candidate for the checkpoint slot {}
predicate_mappings.checkpoint_verification_candidate: {} is a candidate for the verification suite {}
predicate_mappings.checkpoint_dependent_service_candidate: {} is a candidate for the dependent service {}
predicate_mappings.checkpoint_config_item_candidate: {} is a candidate for the configuration item {}
predicate_mappings.checkpoint_external_dependency_candidate: {} is a candidate for the external dependency {}

predicate_mappings.checkpoint_canary_candidate: {} is a candidate for the canary profile {}

predicate_mappings.checkpoint_endpoint_binding: {} is bound to the network endpoint {}
predicate_mappings.checkpoint_policy_candidate_binding: the checkpoint {} is bound to the traffic policy candidate {}

preconditions: I can only create a cutover checkpoint A if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I create a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A is registered

reserve_deployment_slot.description: reserve a cutover checkpoint A for a deployment slot B
preconditions: I can only reserve a cutover checkpoint A for a deployment slot B if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the checkpoint slot B
I can only reserve a cutover checkpoint A for a deployment slot B if it is not the case that A has an allocation
effects: Once I reserve a cutover checkpoint A for a deployment slot B, it is the case that A is allocated to deployment slot B and A has an allocation
Once I reserve a cutover checkpoint A for a deployment slot B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_deployment_slot.description: release a cutover checkpoint A from a deployment slot B
preconditions: I can only release a cutover checkpoint A from a deployment slot B if it is the case that A is allocated to deployment slot B
I can only release a cutover checkpoint A from a deployment slot B if it is not the case that verification for A is completed and it is not the case that validation gate for A is passed
effects: Once I release a cutover checkpoint A from a deployment slot B, it is the case that B is available

Once I release a cutover checkpoint A from a deployment slot B, it is not the case anymore that A is allocated to deployment slot B and it is not the case anymore that A has an allocation and it is not the case anymore that the operator approval is recorded for A and it is not the case anymore that artifacts are staged for A and it is not the case anymore that approval for A is claimed and it is not the case anymore that A is staged for promotion and it is not the case anymore that the backup A is consumed

attach_network_endpoint.description: attach a network endpoint B to a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only attach a network endpoint B to a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I attach a network endpoint B to a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A is bound to the network endpoint B
Once I attach a network endpoint B to a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

detach_network_endpoint.description: detach a network endpoint B from a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only detach a network endpoint B from a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is bound to the network endpoint B
effects: Once I detach a network endpoint B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that B is available
Once I detach a network endpoint B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the network endpoint B

configure_endpoint_for_validation.description: configure a network endpoint B for validation with a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only configure a network endpoint B for validation with a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is registered and A has an allocation and A is bound to the network endpoint B
I can only configure a network endpoint B for validation with a cutover checkpoint A if it is not the case that the operator approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I configure a network endpoint B for validation with a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that the operator approval is recorded for A

record_operator_approval.description: record operator approval for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B
preconditions: I can only record operator approval for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B if it is the case that A is registered and A has an allocation and B is available
I can only record operator approval for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B if it is not the case that the operator approval is recorded for A
effects: Once I record operator approval for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B, it is the case that the operator approval is recorded for A and approval for A is claimed
Once I record operator approval for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

stage_artifact_with_script.description: stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C
preconditions: I can only stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C if it is the case that the operator approval is recorded for A and A has an allocation and A is bound to the network endpoint B and C is available
I can only stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C if it is not the case that artifacts are staged for A
effects: Once I stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C, it is the case that artifacts are staged for A
Once I stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C, it is not the case anymore that approval for A is claimed

stage_artifact_with_policy.description: stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a traffic policy B
preconditions: I can only stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a traffic policy B if it is the case that A has an allocation and A has the policy B applied
I can only stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a traffic policy B if it is not the case that artifacts are staged for A
effects: Once I stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a traffic policy B, it is the case that artifacts are staged for A
Once I stage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a traffic policy B, it is not the case anymore that approval for A is claimed

acquire_dependent_service.description: acquire a dependent service B for a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only acquire a dependent service B for a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the dependent service B
effects: Once I acquire a dependent service B for a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A binds the dependent service B
Once I acquire a dependent service B for a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_dependent_service.description: release a dependent service B from a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only release a dependent service B from a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A binds the dependent service B
effects: Once I release a dependent service B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a dependent service B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that A binds the dependent service B

acquire_config_item.description: acquire a configuration item B with a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only acquire a configuration item B with a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the configuration item B
effects: Once I acquire a configuration item B with a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A binds the configuration item B
Once I acquire a configuration item B with a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_config_item.description: release a configuration item B from a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only release a configuration item B from a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A binds the configuration item B
effects: Once I release a configuration item B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a configuration item B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that A binds the configuration item B

acquire_external_dependency.description: acquire an external dependency B for a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only acquire an external dependency B for a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the external dependency B
effects: Once I acquire an external dependency B for a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A binds the external dependency B
Once I acquire an external dependency B for a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_external_dependency.description: release an external dependency B from a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only release an external dependency B from a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A binds the external dependency B
effects: Once I release an external dependency B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an external dependency B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that A binds the external dependency B

register_canary_profile.description: register a canary profile B with a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only register a canary profile B with a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and A is a candidate for the canary profile B
effects: Once I register a canary profile B with a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A binds the canary profile B
Once I register a canary profile B with a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unregister_canary_profile.description: unregister a canary profile B from a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only unregister a canary profile B from a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A binds the canary profile B
effects: Once I unregister a canary profile B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unregister a canary profile B from a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that A binds the canary profile B

execute_verification_with_snapshot.description: execute verification with snapshot for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B with a dependent service C and a configuration item D
preconditions: I can only execute verification with snapshot for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B with a dependent service C and a configuration item D if it is the case that A has an allocation and A binds the dependent service C and A binds the configuration item D and B is available for verification and A is a candidate for the verification suite B

I can only execute verification with snapshot for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B with a dependent service C and a configuration item D if it is not the case that verification for A is completed
effects: Once I execute verification with snapshot for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B with a dependent service C and a configuration item D, it is the case that A executed the verification suite B and verification for A is completed

Once I execute verification with snapshot for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B with a dependent service C and a configuration item D, it is not the case anymore that B is available for verification

execute_deployment_with_backup.description: execute deployment with backup for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B, an external dependency C, and a backup snapshot D
preconditions: I can only execute deployment with backup for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B, an external dependency C, and a backup snapshot D if it is the case that A has an allocation and A binds the external dependency C and D is available and B is available for verification and A is a candidate for the verification suite B and A is a candidate for the backup snapshot D

I can only execute deployment with backup for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B, an external dependency C, and a backup snapshot D if it is not the case that verification for A is completed
effects: Once I execute deployment with backup for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B, an external dependency C, and a backup snapshot D, it is the case that A executed the verification suite B and verification for A is completed and the backup A is consumed and approval for A is claimed

Once I execute deployment with backup for a cutover checkpoint A using a verification suite B, an external dependency C, and a backup snapshot D, it is not the case anymore that B is available for verification and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_validation_gate.description: finalize validation gate for a cutover checkpoint A with a dependent service B and a configuration item C
preconditions: I can only finalize validation gate for a cutover checkpoint A with a dependent service B and a configuration item C if it is the case that verification for A is completed and the backup A is consumed and A binds the dependent service B and A binds the configuration item C
effects: Once I finalize validation gate for a cutover checkpoint A with a dependent service B and a configuration item C, it is not the case anymore that the backup A is consumed and it is not the case anymore that approval for A is claimed

mark_validation_ready_with_approval.description: mark validation ready with approval for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B, a configuration item C, and an approval gate D
preconditions: I can only mark validation ready with approval for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B, a configuration item C, and an approval gate D if it is the case that artifacts are staged for A and verification for A is completed and A binds the dependent service B and A binds the configuration item C and A is bound to the operator group D

I can only mark validation ready with approval for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B, a configuration item C, and an approval gate D if it is not the case that approval for A is claimed and it is not the case that validation gate for A is passed
effects: Once I mark validation ready with approval for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B, a configuration item C, and an approval gate D, it is the case that validation gate for A is passed

mark_validation_ready_with_canary.description: mark validation ready with canary for a cutover checkpoint A involving an external dependency B, a canary profile C, and an operator group token D
preconditions: I can only mark validation ready with canary for a cutover checkpoint A involving an external dependency B, a canary profile C, and an operator group token D if it is the case that artifacts are staged for A and verification for A is completed and A binds the external dependency B and A binds the canary profile C and A is bound to the operator group D

I can only mark validation ready with canary for a cutover checkpoint A involving an external dependency B, a canary profile C, and an operator group token D if it is not the case that validation gate for A is passed
effects: Once I mark validation ready with canary for a cutover checkpoint A involving an external dependency B, a canary profile C, and an operator group token D, it is the case that validation gate for A is passed and approval for A is claimed

promote_staged_to_staged_flag.description: promote staged to staged flag for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B and a configuration item C
preconditions: I can only promote staged to staged flag for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B and a configuration item C if it is the case that validation gate for A is passed and approval for A is claimed and A binds the dependent service B and A binds the configuration item C
effects: Once I promote staged to staged flag for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B and a configuration item C, it is the case that A is staged for promotion

Once I promote staged to staged flag for a cutover checkpoint A involving a dependent service B and a configuration item C, it is not the case anymore that approval for A is claimed and it is not the case anymore that artifacts are staged for A and it is not the case anymore that the backup A is consumed

restage_artifact_with_script.description: restage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C
preconditions: I can only restage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C if it is the case that A is staged for promotion and validation gate for A is passed and A has an allocation and A is bound to the network endpoint B and C is available
I can only restage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C if it is not the case that artifacts are staged for A
effects: Once I restage artifact for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C, it is the case that artifacts are staged for A

mark_readiness_for_endpoint.description: mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A at a network endpoint B
preconditions: I can only mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A at a network endpoint B if it is the case that validation gate for A is passed and artifacts are staged for A and A is bound to the network endpoint B
I can only mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A at a network endpoint B if it is not the case that approval for A is claimed and it is not the case that readiness is marked for A
effects: Once I mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A at a network endpoint B, it is the case that readiness is marked for A

mark_readiness_with_runbook.description: mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B
preconditions: I can only mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B if it is the case that validation gate for A is passed and artifacts are staged for A and B is available
I can only mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B if it is not the case that approval for A is claimed and it is not the case that readiness is marked for A
effects: Once I mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B, it is the case that readiness is marked for A
Once I mark readiness for a cutover checkpoint A using a runbook B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

apply_traffic_policy_to_checkpoint.description: apply a traffic policy B to a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only apply a traffic policy B to a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that readiness is marked for A and B is available and the checkpoint A is bound to the traffic policy candidate B
effects: Once I apply a traffic policy B to a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A has the primary policy B assigned
Once I apply a traffic policy B to a cutover checkpoint A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_policy_between_cutovers.description: bind a traffic policy C between a secondary cutover A and a primary cutover B
preconditions: I can only bind a traffic policy C between a secondary cutover A and a primary cutover B if it is the case that A is registered and A has a secondary role and A has the secondary policy C assigned and B has the primary policy C assigned
I can only bind a traffic policy C between a secondary cutover A and a primary cutover B if it is not the case that A has the policy C applied
effects: Once I bind a traffic policy C between a secondary cutover A and a primary cutover B, it is the case that A has the policy C applied

record_audit_token.description: record audit token for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C
preconditions: I can only record audit token for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C if it is the case that A is registered and A has a secondary role and artifacts are staged for A and readiness is marked for A and A is bound to the network endpoint B and C is available
I can only record audit token for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C if it is not the case that A is marked for a staged audit
effects: Once I record audit token for a cutover checkpoint A using a network endpoint B and an automation script C, it is the case that A is marked for a staged audit

finalize_checkpoint_state.description: finalize state of a cutover checkpoint A
preconditions: I can only finalize state of a cutover checkpoint A if it is the case that A has a primary role and A is registered and A has an allocation and verification for A is completed and validation gate for A is passed and readiness is marked for A and artifacts are staged for A
I can only finalize state of a cutover checkpoint A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize state of a cutover checkpoint A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_checkpoint_with_policy.description: finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a traffic policy B applied
preconditions: I can only finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a traffic policy B applied if it is the case that A has a secondary role and A is registered and A has an allocation and verification for A is completed and validation gate for A is passed and readiness is marked for A and artifacts are staged for A and A has the policy B applied
I can only finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a traffic policy B applied if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a traffic policy B applied, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_checkpoint_with_audit.description: finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a staged audit
preconditions: I can only finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a staged audit if it is the case that A has a secondary role and A is registered and A has an allocation and verification for A is completed and validation gate for A is passed and readiness is marked for A and artifacts are staged for A and A is marked for a staged audit
I can only finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a staged audit if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a cutover checkpoint A with a staged audit, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.reserve_deployment_slot: reserve cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} for deployment slot {?deployment_slot}
action_nl_templates.release_deployment_slot: release cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} from deployment slot {?deployment_slot}
action_nl_templates.attach_network_endpoint: attach network endpoint {?network_endpoint} to cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.detach_network_endpoint: detach network endpoint {?network_endpoint} from cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.configure_endpoint_for_validation: configure network endpoint {?network_endpoint} for validation with cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.record_operator_approval: record operator approval for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.stage_artifact_with_script: stage artifact for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using network endpoint {?network_endpoint} and automation script {?automation_script}
action_nl_templates.stage_artifact_with_policy: stage artifact for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using traffic policy {?traffic_policy}
action_nl_templates.acquire_dependent_service: acquire dependent service {?dependent_service} for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.release_dependent_service: release dependent service {?dependent_service} from cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.acquire_config_item: acquire configuration item {?configuration_item} with cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.release_config_item: release configuration item {?configuration_item} from cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.acquire_external_dependency: acquire external dependency {?external_dependency} for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.release_external_dependency: release external dependency {?external_dependency} from cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.register_canary_profile: register canary profile {?canary_profile} with cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.unregister_canary_profile: unregister canary profile {?canary_profile} from cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}
action_nl_templates.execute_verification_with_snapshot: execute verification with snapshot for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using verification suite {?verification_suite} with dependent service {?dependent_service} and configuration item {?configuration_item}
action_nl_templates.execute_deployment_with_backup: execute deployment with backup for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using verification suite {?verification_suite}, external dependency {?external_dependency}, and backup snapshot {?backup_snapshot}
action_nl_templates.finalize_validation_gate: finalize validation gate for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} with dependent service {?dependent_service} and configuration item {?configuration_item}
action_nl_templates.mark_validation_ready_with_approval: mark validation ready with approval for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} involving dependent service {?dependent_service}, configuration item {?configuration_item}, and approval gate {?approval_gate}
action_nl_templates.mark_validation_ready_with_canary: mark validation ready with canary for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} involving external dependency {?external_dependency}, canary profile {?canary_profile}, and operator group token {?audit_token}
action_nl_templates.promote_staged_to_staged_flag: promote staged to staged flag for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} involving dependent service {?dependent_service} and configuration item {?configuration_item}
action_nl_templates.restage_artifact_with_script: restage artifact for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using network endpoint {?network_endpoint} and automation script {?automation_script}
action_nl_templates.mark_readiness_for_endpoint: mark readiness for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} at network endpoint {?network_endpoint}
action_nl_templates.mark_readiness_with_runbook: mark readiness for cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} using runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.apply_traffic_policy_to_checkpoint: apply traffic policy {?traffic_policy} to cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_deployment_slot: release a cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} from a deployment slot {?deployment_slot}

action_nl_templates_indef.detach_network_endpoint: detach a network endpoint {?network_endpoint} from a cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}

action_nl_templates_indef.release_external_dependency: release an external dependency {?external_dependency} from a cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint}

action_nl_templates_indef.mark_validation_ready_with_canary: mark validation ready with canary for a cutover checkpoint {?checkpoint} involving an external dependency {?external_dependency}, a canary profile {?canary_profile}, and an operator group token {?audit_token}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a base object is also a object

Everything that is a cutover checkpoint or a deployment slot or a verification suite or a configuration item or a dependent service or a external dependency or a network endpoint or a runbook or a traffic policy or a automation script or a backup snapshot or a canary profile or a operator group is also a base object
Everything that is a approval gate or a operator group token is also a operator group
Everything that is a primary cutover or a secondary cutover is also a cutover checkpoint
